返回本批次

Show HN：16 年后我收回了 Video.js，我们将其重写为小 88%

Show HN: I took back Video.js after 16 years and we rewrote it to be 88% smaller

videojs.org 作者 Heff 分数 357 评论 62 2026/03/25 02:03
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 2026 年 3 月 10 日 • 阅读 14 分钟 今天，我们很高兴发布 Video.js v10.0.0 测试版。这是相当大的彻底重写的结果，不仅是 Video.js（讨论），还包括 Plyr、Vidstack 和 Media Chrome，通过开源项目和非常关心网络视频的人们的罕见合作，总共有 75,000 个 github star 和每月数百亿的视频播放量。我在 16 年前构建了 Video.js，以帮助从 Flash 到 HTML5 视频的过渡。从那时起，在许多人的帮助下，它得到了很大的发展，但代码库和 API 继续反映了 Web 开发的不同时代。这种重建使玩家的开发方式现代化，并为下一次向人工智能增强功能和开发的重大转变奠定了基础。我们专注于： 缩小捆绑包大小，然后进一步缩小（默认捆绑包大小减少 88%） 允许使用您所选框架熟悉的开发模式进行深度定制 - 包括新的一流 React、Typescript 和 Tailwind 支持 让默认值看起来很漂亮并且性能也很出色（专家们打电话给我说“先生，你是如何使它如此出色？”。这真的令人难以置信。）设计代码库和文档，以便 AI 代理与您一起构建您的播放器，实际上可以擅长它我们非常确定它的工作方式与您对网络媒体播放器的期望不同，同时我们希望它让您感觉更熟悉您的实际构建方式。超文本标记语言
  2. 反应
  3. <small>捆绑</small> 如今，对视频播放器最大的抱怨之一是它们的文件大小，压缩后的文件大小通常为 1MB 左右，压缩后的文件大小为数百 KB。播放器是极其复杂的应用程序，因此您可以削减的字节数有限，但传统播放器是在智能捆绑器、tree shake 和其他节省大小的机会出现之前构建的。它们带有许多您可能不经常使用的功能。 Video.js v10 默认播放器现在比之前版本 (v8.x.x) 默认播放器的大小小 88%。其中很大一部分节省来自取消捆绑自适应比特率 (ABR) 支持的决定，您可以在之前的版本中通过从 video.js/core 导入来删除该支持，但大多数 video.js 安装仅使用默认捆绑包，而不使用自适应流功能。与更多类似的苹果相比，删除 ABR 后，v10 默认视频播放器 (HTML) 的大小仍然比之前版本小 66%，根据您需要的捆绑包，甚至会更小。
  4. 播放器压缩 (kB) gzip (kB) 注释 Video.js v8（核心） 260.5 75.2 Vidstack 237.4 74.1 Media Chrome 175.5 41.3 Plyr 109.8 32.6 Video.js v10 视频播放器 [HTML] 97.4 25.1 Video.js v10 音频播放器 [HTML] 85.8 23.0 Video.js v10 视频播放器 [React] 62.0 18.0 Video.js v10 音频播放器 [React] 49.2 15.2 Video.js v10 背景视频 [HTML] 22.2 6.9 Video.js v10 背景视频 [React] 10.7 3.5 v10 引擎 (vroooom) 虽然上一节比较了没有 ABR 的播放器，但全功能视频的重量很大播放器来自流媒体引擎，需要处理自适应比特率 (ABR) 格式（如 HLS 和 DASH），用于清单解析、分段加载、缓冲区管理、ABR 逻辑、编解码器检测、MSE 集成、DRM、服务器端广告等。与播放器类似，传统的流媒体引擎具有整体架构，因此很难减小捆绑包的大小。作为 v10 的一部分，我们启动了一个名为 SPF 😎（流处理器框架）的新引擎项目，这是一个围绕功能组件构建的框架，这些组件组成了专门构建的小型流引擎。例如，如果您有一个具有简单自适应流媒体需求的短视频应用程序，则您的引擎将不会附带任何 DRM 和广告代码。对于简单的 HLS 用例，使用 SPF 的 Video.js v10 文件大小仅为 Video.js v8（包括自适应比特率流 (ABR)）的 19%。
  5. 播放器 minified (kB) gzip (kB) 注释 Vidstack + HLS.js 764.3 238.1 Media Chrome + HLS.js 701.2 202.9 Video.js v8 + VHS* 697.0 202.7 *VHS 默认捆绑 Plyr + HLS.js 614.0 188.5 Video.js v10 + HLS.js 526.5 164.1 Video.js v10 + SPF [HTML] 144.6 38.7 Video.js v10 + SPF [React] 107.3 31.6 v10 背景视频 + SPF [HTML] 61.2 18.9 v10 背景视频 + SPF [React] 49.2 15.6 将引擎与引擎进行比较，您可以更清楚地了解故事。其他引擎很难在不分叉的情况下变得更小，而使用 SPF 组成的引擎仅包含使用 HLS 的简单自适应流所需的内容，使其文件大小仅为 HLS.js-light 的 12%。

Original Summary

  1. Mar 10, 2026 • 14 min read Today we’re excited to release the Video.js v10.0.0 beta. It’s the result of a rather large ground-up rewrite, not just of Video.js (discussion) but also of Plyr, Vidstack, and Media Chrome, through a rare teaming-up of open source projects and people who care a lot about web video, with a combined 75,000 github stars and tens of billions of video plays monthly. I built Video.js 16 years ago to help the transition from Flash to HTML5 video. It’s grown a lot since then with the help of many people, but the codebase and APIs have continued to reflect a different era of web development. This rebuild modernizes the player both for how developers build today and sets up the foundation for the next significant transition to AI-augmented features and development. We’ve focused on: Shrinking bundle sizes, and then shrinking them more (88% reduction in default bundle size) Allowing deep customization using the familiar development patterns of your chosen framework — including new first-class React, Typescript, and Tailwind support Making the defaults look beautiful and perform beautifully (The experts are calling me saying “Sir, how did you make it so great?”. It’s incredible, really.) Designing the codebase and docs so AI agents building your player alongside you can actually be good at it We’re pretty sure it works differently from what you’ve come to expect of a web media player, while we hope it feels more familiar to how you actually build. HTML
  2. React
  3. <small>Bundle</small> One of the biggest complaints about video players today is their file size, often weighing in around 1MB minified and hundreds of KB gzipped. Players are sneakily-complex applications so there’s only so many bytes you can shave off, but legacy players were built in times before smart bundlers, tree shaking, and other size-saving opportunities. They carry with them many features you may not be actively using. The Video.js v10 default player is now 88% smaller than the size of the previous version’s (v8.x.x) default. A good chunk of those savings come from the decision to unbundle adaptive bitrate (ABR) support, which you could remove in the previous version by instead importing from video.js/core , but the majority of video.js installs just use the default bundle while also not using the adaptive streaming features. Comparing more similar apples, with ABR removed, the v10 default video player (HTML) is still 66% smaller than the size of the previous version, getting even smaller from there depending on which bundle you need.
  4. player minified (kB) gzip (kB) notes Video.js v8 (core) 260.5 75.2 Vidstack 237.4 74.1 Media Chrome 175.5 41.3 Plyr 109.8 32.6 Video.js v10 Video Player [HTML] 97.4 25.1 Video.js v10 Audio Player [HTML] 85.8 23.0 Video.js v10 Video Player [React] 62.0 18.0 Video.js v10 Audio Player [React] 49.2 15.2 Video.js v10 Background Video [HTML] 22.2 6.9 Video.js v10 Background Video [React] 10.7 3.5 v10 Engine (vroooom) While the previous section was comparing players without ABR, a lot of the weight of a fully-featured video player comes from the streaming engine which is needed to handle adaptive bitrate (ABR) formats like HLS and DASH — for manifest parsing, segment loading, buffer management, ABR logic, codec detection, MSE integration, DRM, server-side ads, and more. Similar to players, traditional streaming engines have monolithic architectures making it difficult to get the bundle size smaller. As part of v10 we’ve started a new engine project called SPF 😎 (Streaming Processor Framework), which is a framework built around functional components that are composed into purpose-built, smaller streaming engines. For example if you have a short-form video app with simple adaptive streaming needs, your engine won’t ship with any code for DRM and ads. For a simple HLS use case, Video.js v10 using SPF is only 19% the file size of Video.js v8 including adaptive bitrate streaming (ABR).
  5. player minified (kB) gzip (kB) notes Vidstack + HLS.js 764.3 238.1 Media Chrome + HLS.js 701.2 202.9 Video.js v8 + VHS* 697.0 202.7 *VHS is bundled by default Plyr + HLS.js 614.0 188.5 Video.js v10 + HLS.js 526.5 164.1 Video.js v10 + SPF [HTML] 144.6 38.7 Video.js v10 + SPF [React] 107.3 31.6 v10 Background Video + SPF [HTML] 61.2 18.9 v10 Background Video + SPF [React] 49.2 15.6 Comparing engines to engines you get a clearer picture of the story. The other engines are very difficult to get any smaller without forking them, while the engine composed using SPF only includes what’s needed for simple adaptive streaming using HLS, making it only 12% the file size of even HLS.js-light .

rendaw 2026/03/25 12:19
我从未使用过 video.js，该网站/广告似乎相当面向使用过它或熟悉它的人。

在阅读该网站时，我有一个无法回答的问题：这与原生 html 视频元素有何不同？

AFAICT 只是交通管制？

I've never used video.js, and the site/advertising seems to be fairly oriented towards people who have used it or are familiar with it.

I had one question I couldn't answer reading the site: what makes this different from the native html video element?

AFAICT just the transport controls?

在 HN 中查看
Heff 2026/03/25 13:21
公平地说，我们可以在网站上更直接地回答这个问题。除了比较之外，还有其他什么东西让它看起来更适合已经熟悉它的人吗？

一般来说，视频标签很棒，并且自 Video.js 首次创建以来已经取得了很大的进步。如果您对视频的看法基本上是带有播放按钮的图像，那么视频标签就很有效。如果在某个时候您需要 Video.js，它很快就会变得显而易见。显着差异包括：

*跨浏览器一致的、可设计样式的控件（每个浏览器都会随着时间的推移更改其本机控件）

* 高级功能，如分析、ABR、广告、DRM、360 度视频（新版本中尚未包含所有这些功能）

*可配置的功能（通过浏览器用户界面，您基本上得到了您所得到的）

* 许多流媒体格式（mp4/mp3、HLS、DASH）和服务（Youtube、Vimeo、Wistia）的通用 API

当然，其中许多事情都可以通过 video 标签本身完成，因为（除了 iframe 播放器）video.js 在幕后使用 video 标签。但要添加这些功能，您最终将构建类似 video.js 的东西。

Fair point, we could answer that more directly on the site. Besides the comparison were there other things that make it seem oriented to people already familiar with it?

Generally, the video tag is great and has come a very long way from when Video.js was first created. If the way you think about video is basically an image with a play button, then the video tag works well. If at some point you need Video.js, it'll become obvious pretty quick. Notable differences include:

* Consistent, stylable controls across browsers (browsers each change their native controls over time)

* Advanced features like analytics, ABR, ads, DRM, 360 video (not all of those are in the new version yet)

* Configurable features (with browsers UIs you mostly get what you get)

* A common API to many streaming formats (mp4/mp3, HLS, DASH) and services (Youtube, Vimeo, Wistia)

Of course many of those things are doable with the video tag itself, because (aside from the iframe players) video.js uses the video tag under the hood. But to add those features you're going to end up building something like video.js.

在 HN 中查看
nshelia 2026/03/25 13:01
它只是不适用于所有环境。每个浏览器版本都有自己的问题和边缘情况。如果您需要稳定的视频播放器或想要流媒体功能，您应该使用它。

P.S i 为乔治亚州构建了电影流媒体和电视广播播放器，并支持从 2009 年 LG 智能电视到现代浏览器的环境。

it just doesn’t work in every environment. every browser version has it’s own issues and edge cases. If you need stable video player or want streaming features you should use it.

P.S i built movie streaming and tv broadcasting player for country of Georgia and supported environments from 2009 LG Smart TVs to modern browsers.

you think it’s solid until you want customization and old browser support. it should work fine if you just want to autoplay a small size mp4 file on mute
在 HN 中查看
BatteryMountain 2026/03/25 14:52
我不熟悉视频托管，但玩过 html5 视频播放器，但我有这个问题：在服务器端，我是否必须托管一个提供视频块的特定端点？假设我拍摄 800mb 的 720p 视频，然后使用 ffmpeg 将其分成 2mb 的片段。所以我在某个地方（网络服务器、cdn、blob 存储）有一个包含原始 4K 视频的文件夹，然后生成 1440p、1080p、720p 的缩小版本，所以我最终得到 4 个大文件，然后对于每个文件，我将它们分成与比特率/关键帧一致的合理大小。然后生成一些缩略图。关于分块/托管视频文件以便 videojs 运行最好、最流畅的“最佳”方法有什么建议吗？我觉得我应该构建一个非常精简/快速的块和缩略图服务器，只有一个或两个端点。或者最好让网络服务器来完成这项工作？或者现成的媒体服务器（比如在自托管社区中）？
I'm not familiar with video hosting but have played with html5 video player but I have this question: on the servers side, do I have to host a specific endpoint that serves chunks of video? Lets say I take 720p video @ 800mb and I chunk it into 2mb pieces with ffmpeg. So I have a folder somewhere (webserver, cdn, blob storage) with the original 4K video, then generate downscaled versions for 1440p, 1080p, 720p, so I end up with 4 large files, and then for each of those, I chunk them into reasonable sizes that aligns with bitrates / key frames. And then some thumbnail generation. Any advise on what the "best" way would be to chunk/host video files so that videojs runs the best and smoothest? I feel that I should build a very lean/fast chunk & thumbnail server, just one or two endpoints. Or is it best to let the webserver do the lifting? Or off-the-shelf media servers (like in the self-hosting community)?

jjcm 2026/03/25 08:23
出于好奇，为什么不将其作为 Web 组件分发呢？这是一个完美的用例 - 内置控件/镶边的语义对象。
Out of curiousity, why not distribute this as a webcomponent? It's a perfect use case for it - a semantic object that has built in controls / chrome.
在 HN 中查看
mmcclure 2026/03/25 08:47
啊……你这个完全合理的问题是在揭伤疤。

我们从 media-chrome[1] 和 Mux Player 中吸取了一些惨痛的教训，我们尝试只编写 Web 组件。 React 方面有点棘手，所以我们创建了 React 垫片，它提供了更惯用的 React 体验并渲染了 Web 组件……这基本上很好，但产生了一系列新问题。我们选择 Web 组件的原因是 不是 必须编写特定于框架的代码，然后我们发现自己无论如何都要做。

有了 VJS 10，我认为我们已经找到了一个相当合理的中间立场。核心库是“无头的”，渲染层位于其之上。 React 组件的好处是真实的 和 不错的网络组件。

[1] https://github.com/muxinc/media-chrome

Ah...you're scratching at some scabs with this totally reasonable question.

We learned some tough lessons with media-chrome[1] and Mux Player, where we tried to just write web components. The React side of things was a bit of a thorn, so we created React shims that provided a more idiomatic React experience and rendered the web components...which was mostly fine, but created a new set of issues. The reason we chose web components was to not have to write framework-specific code, and then we found ourselves doing both anyway.

With VJS 10 I think we've landed on a pretty reasonable middle ground. The core library is "headless," and then the rendering layer sits on top of it. Benefit is true React components and nice web components.

[1] https://github.com/muxinc/media-chrome

在 HN 中查看
derefr 2026/03/25 08:25
它本身不是一个 Web 组件吗？根据这篇文章，所有的 React 东西似乎都被烘焙成 HTML 自定义元素，这些元素通过一些客户端 JS 注册来连接。即使客户端 JS 嵌入到 React SPA 代码包中，它仍然是一个“Web 组件”，不是吗？

如果你的意思是“为什么我需要 React /任何类型的捆绑；为什么我不能只包含缩小的 video.js 库作为脚本标签/ES6 模块导入？” ——我猜你是 能，但没有人真的应该 想 到，因为这里的一半要点是注册支持自定义元素的玩家 JS 现在要小得多，因为它正在树摇动到只有 JS 必需的 支持您在网站上使用的自定义元素的特定组合。这样做需要在“编译时”，tree-shaking 逻辑能够理解从视图到播放器库组件的引用。当前，当您的视图是 React 组件时这是可能的，但不是 然而 当您的视图是包含 HTML 自定义元素的普通 HTML 时，这是可能的（据我所知）。

我想你可能会说，如果你想这样想，你的构建脚本/资产管道最终将充当网络组件 工厂 为您的网站生成最终的定制 Web 组件？

Is it not a web component, per se? Per the article, all the React stuff does seem to bake down to HTML Custom Elements, that get wired up by some client-side JS registering for them. That client-side JS is still a "web component", even if it's embedded inside React SPA code bundle, no?

If you mean "why do I need React / any kind of bundling; why can't I just include the minified video.js library as a script tag / ES6 module import?" — I'm guessing you can, but nobody should really want to, since half the point here is that the player JS that registers to back the custom elements, is now way smaller, because it's getting tree-shaken down to just the JS required to back the particular combination of custom elements that you happen to use on your site. And doing that requires that, at "compile time", the tree-shaking logic can understand the references from your views into the components of the player library. That's currently possible when your view is React components, but not yet possible (AFAIK) when your view is ordinary HTML containing HTML Custom Elements.

I guess you could say, if you want to think of it this way, that your buildscript / asset pipeline here ends up acting as a web-component factory to generate the final custom-tailored web-component for your website?

Hope this new iteration is exceptionally successful.

Heff 2026/03/25 08:51
哦嗨扎克！来自过去的爆炸。希望您一切顺利，并感谢您的良好祝愿。一直很喜欢在 FOMS 和会议上与您和 JW 团队聊天。如果您想重新跳入水中，视频技术中的水会温暖回来！

在 HN 中查看
nulltrace 2026/03/25 09:07
createPlayer 的特征数组方法很聪明。我们做了类似的事情，将一个整体拆分为每个功能包，最困难的部分不是拆分本身，而是弄清楚边界在哪里。两个功能看起来是独立的，直到您意识到它们共享一些双方都不想拥有的状态。好奇他们如何处理跨功能状态部门。
The feature-array approach to createPlayer is smart. We did something similar splitting a monolith into per-feature packages and the hardest part wasn't the split itself, it was figuring out where the boundaries go. Two features look independent until you realize they share some piece of state that neither wants to own. Curious how they handle cross-feature state deps here.
在 HN 中查看
cpillsbury 2026/03/25 09:38
嘿，VJS 核心贡献者在这里。我们确实感受到了这种担忧，而且我们还没有正式的灵丹妙药。我怀疑我们在某个时候需要某种替代实现或功能增强。我们目前正在以更临时的方式做事，例如画中画和全屏之间的相互关系（参见，例如： https://github.com/videojs/v10/blob/main/packages/core/src/d...）。
Hey VJS core contributor here. We definitely feel that concern and we also don't yet have a silver bullet formalized. I suspect we'll need some kind of alternate implementations or feature augmentation at some point. We're currently doing things in a bit more ad hoc way, such as the interrelationship between PiP and Fullscreen (see, e.g.: https://github.com/videojs/v10/blob/main/packages/core/src/d...).
在 HN 中查看
cpillsbury 2026/03/25 09:43
另一件需要注意的事情是：因为这些功能是“组合的”，所以我们至少在这里有很大的灵活性，这让我对基础知识感觉非常好，而不是在这里“将自己编码到一个角落”。
One other thing to note: because the features are "composed", we at least have a lot of flexibility here that makes me feel pretty good about the fundamentals and not "coding ourselves into a corner" here.
在 HN 中查看
nulltrace 2026/03/25 11:42
是的，可组合性为您赢得了很大的空间。一个包含事件的中心商店，将其注入到每个功能中，并且它们保持解耦，而无需将自己卷入其中。
Yeah the composability buys you a lot of room. One central store with events, inject it into each feature, and they stay decoupled without painting yourself in.
在 HN 中查看
blanched 2026/03/25 09:40

nulltrace 2026/03/25 11:51

Just a dev who's built the stuff I talk about. Pretty sure you already know that though, buddy.
在 HN 中查看
efilife 2026/03/25 12:54

在 HN 中查看
bl4kers 2026/03/25 12:13
可能不是基本情况，但替换我的音频播放器（当前使用 Plyr）的快速测试给我带来了以下差距，至少是开箱即用的代码。

1. 播放速率不低于1

2. 手机上没有音量键

3.希望在移动设备上也有搜索按钮

4. 没有（显而易见的）方法来添加强调色，只能使用无聊的单色

5. 文档缺乏清晰的示例/演示/游乐场，因此在实施之前我不确定它会是什么样子

Probably not base case but a quick test to replace my audio player (currently using Plyr) turned up the following gaps for me, at least with the out-of-the-box code.

1. No playback rates under 1

2. No volume rocker on mobile

3. Would appreciate having seek buttons on mobile too

4. No (easily apparent) way to add an accent color, stuck with boring monochrome

5. Docs lacked clear example/demo/playground so I wasn't sure what it would look like until implemented

在 HN 中查看
Heff 2026/03/25 12:37
所有可靠的反馈，谢谢！我确保这些被视为问题。除此之外，我们正在密切跟踪与 Plyr（和其他玩家）的功能对等，我们的目标是在 GA 上实现完全对等，目标是在今年年中。
All solid feedback, thanks! I'm making sure these get captured as issues. Otherwise we're closely tracking feature parity with Plyr (and other players) and our goal is to have full parity by GA, aiming for the middle of the year.
在 HN 中查看
rcakebread 2026/03/25 07:14

I just happened to try v10 yesterday for HLS and it's looking great so far.

rahim_alwer 2026/03/25 08:21

Awesome to hear!
在 HN 中查看
naseemali925 2026/03/25 11:40
这太棒了。我们还创建了一个玩家上下文提供程序，并使用它来全局维护/改变玩家状态。如果还可以分享与玩家事件相关的任何示例以及在 V10 中注册插件的新方法，这也将有助于更好地理解整体情况。
This is amazing. We also kind of created a Player context provider and was using it to maintain/mutate player state globally. If its possible to also share any examples related to player events and new way to register plugins in V10, that would also help better understand the overall picture.
在 HN 中查看
rahim_alwer 2026/03/25 14:32
嘿，我是 Video.js 团队的成员！听起来您的上下文提供者方法已经在正确的范围内！

一些背景：我们的 store[1] 受到 Zustand[2] 的启发，也是通过上下文创建和传承的。这是我们库的中央状态管理部分，我们认为大多数开发人员将在此基础上进行扩展和定制以满足他们的需求。

更新是通过简单的存储操作（如 `store.play()`、`store.setVolume(10)` 等）来处理的。这些操作通常是为了响应 DOM 事件而调用。

在事件方面，在 v10 中，您不是直接注册事件侦听器，而是订阅商店。像 `store.subscribe(callback)` 这样的东西，或者在 React 中你会使用我们的 `usePlayer`[3] 钩子。商店是唯一的事实来源，因此您不是直接监听底层媒体元素，而是观察状态变化。

---

到目前为止，对于 v10，我们还没有考虑传统意义上的“插件”。如果我必须猜测它会是什么样子，那就是三件事：

1. 自定义存储切片[4]，以便插件可以使用自己的状态和操作扩展存储

2. 插入商店操作管道的中间件层，以便插件可以在应用操作之前或之后拦截操作或对其做出反应，类似于 Zustand 中间件，甚至以 Video.js v8 中间件等方式[5]

3. 插件可以提供的 UI 组件使用我们的核心原语来访问商店、订阅状态等。

我相信这将涵盖 v8 中所需的绝大多数插件。我们还没有确定确切的 API 但这是我们倾向于的方向。我们仍在积极开发库和文档，因此我还没有可以链接到这些内容的地方（遗憾的是）！我们的目标可能会更早，但正式发布（六月底）是最后期限。

我还应该补充...我们早期原型化的一件事可能会返回：跟踪商店中的端到端请求。 DOM 事件触发存储操作（例如播放），该操作会调用 `video.play()`，然后等待媒体事件响应（播放、错误等）。它工作得非常好，并且与中间件方向很好地吻合。

[1]： https://github.com/videojs/v10/tree/main/packages/store

[2]： https://github.com/pmndrs/zustand

[3]： https://videojs.org/docs/framework/react/reference/use-playe...

[4]： https://zustand.docs.pmnd.rs/learn/guides/slices-pattern#sli...

[5]： https://legacy.videojs.org/guides/middleware/

Hey there, I'm on the Video.js team! Sounds like your context provider approach is already in the right ballpark!

Some background: our store[1] which was inspired by Zustand[2] is created and passed down via context too. This is the central state management piece of our library and where we imagine most devs will build on for extending and customizing to their needs.

Updates are handled via simple store actions like `store.play()`, `store.setVolume(10)`, etc. Those actions are generally called in response to DOM events.

On the events side of things, rather than registering event listeners directly, in v10 you'd subscribe to the store instead. Something like `store.subscribe(callback)`, or in React you'd use our `usePlayer`[3] hook. The store is the single source of truth, so rather than listening to the underlying media element directly, you're observing state changes.

---

So far with v10 we haven't been thinking about "plugins" in the traditional sense either. If I had to guess at what it would look like, it'd be three things:

1. Custom store slices[4] so plugins can extend the store with their own state and actions

2. A middleware layer that plugs into the store's action pipeline so a plugin could intercept or react to actions before or after they're applied, similiar to Zustand middleware, or even in some ways like Video.js v8 middleware[5]

3. UI components that plugins can ship which use our core primitives for accessing the store, subscribing to state, etc.

I believe that'd cover the vast majority of what plugins needed in v8. We haven't nailed down the exact API yet but that's the direction we're leaning towards. We're still actively working on both the library and our docs so I don't have somewhere I can link to for these just yet (sadly)! We're likely targeting sooner, but GA (end of June) is the deadline.

I should also add... one thing we prototyped early on that may return: tracking end-to-end requests through the store. A DOM event triggers a store action like play, which calls `video.play()`, which then waits for the media event response (play, error, etc.). It worked really well and lines up nicely with the middleware direction.

[1]: https://github.com/videojs/v10/tree/main/packages/store

[2]: https://github.com/pmndrs/zustand

[3]: https://videojs.org/docs/framework/react/reference/use-playe...

[4]: https://zustand.docs.pmnd.rs/learn/guides/slices-pattern#sli...

[5]: https://legacy.videojs.org/guides/middleware/

在 HN 中查看
nchmy 2026/03/25 09:15

I was just lamenting the other day about the size of video.js, which is used in my legacy web app, and looking for a way to improve that. Very keen to explore how we could migrate to v10!

Heff 2026/03/25 09:38

https://github.com/videojs/v10/discussions

Drop a note in discussions or issues! Would love to hear what you’re working with.

https://github.com/videojs/v10/discussions

在 HN 中查看
gnulinux996 2026/03/25 09:50
我很好奇，为什么现在有人会选择 HLS 而不是 Dash？

诚然，我对此事的了解相当有限，但我有一些长时间运行的流（几周），并且使用 HLS 时，播放列表变得相当大，而使用 dash 时，mpd 却很小。

I am curious, why would anyone pick HLS over Dash in these days?

Granted, my knowledge on the matter is rather limited, but I had some long running streams (weeks) and with HLS the playlist became quite large while with dash, the mpd was as small as it gets.

在 HN 中查看
KingMob 2026/03/25 11:04
对于除最新的 iOS 设备之外的所有设备来说，它仍然是强制性的，因为这些设备不支持 MediaSourceExtensions。
It's still mandatory for all but the newest iOS devices, which don't support MediaSourceExtensions.
在 HN 中查看
Heff 2026/03/25 11:22
这是事实，整个 iOS/iPadOS/tvOS 生态系统原生支持 HLS，使其在该平台上使用起来更加容易。此外，Chrome 最近添加了对 HLS[1]（而不是 DASH）的支持，因此 HLS 的本机浏览器支持变得相当广泛。

HLS 还具有更新的功能，可以解决您所看到的日益明显的问题。 [2]

话虽如此，我认为如果行业的自适应流媒体标准不完全由苹果控制，很多人会感觉更舒服。

[1] https://caniuse.com/http-live-streaming

[2] https://www.mux.com/blog/low-latency-hls-part-2

This is true, and the whole iOS/iPadOS/tvOS ecosystem supports HLS natively making it much easier to work with on that platform. In addition, Chrome recently added support for HLS[1] (and not DASH), so the native browser support for HLS is getting pretty wide.

HLS also has newer features that address the growing manifest issues you were seeing. [2]

All that said, I think a lot of people would feel more comfortable if the industry's adaptive streaming standard wasn't completely controlled by Apple.

[1] https://caniuse.com/http-live-streaming

[2] https://www.mux.com/blog/low-latency-hls-part-2

在 HN 中查看
Retr0id 2026/03/25 13:45
如何以本机浏览器功能的形式实际使用 HLS？你能把m3u8放在视频src中吗？
How do you actually use HLS in the form of a native browser feature? Can you just put the m3u8 in the video src?
在 HN 中查看
michaelsalim 2026/03/25 06:58
看起来很棒。等事情稳定下来后，我会尝试一下。 与此同时，有人知道这个领域发生了什么吗？在我看来，过去一年发生了很多变化。例如：react-player新版本，被Mux接管。而且我确实意识到 Video.js 是由 Mux 赞助的。而且看似不同的公司也在一起工作。
Looking great. I'll give it a try later on once things stabilize a bit. In the meantime, does anyone know what's going on in this space? Seems to me like a lot is changing over the past year. Eg: react-player new version, taken over by Mux. And also I did realize Video.js is sponsored by Mux. And also seemingly different companies working together.
在 HN 中查看
Heff 2026/03/25 07:49
OP 和 Mux 联合创始人在这里，所以了解这方面的所有背景信息。发生了很多变化。几年前，Mux 介入帮助维护 React Player。它没有得到频繁的更新，并且 Mux 在整个 OSS 播放器生态系统中拥有既得利益（即使我们没有构建它），因为 Mux Video（托管）与播放器无关，并且我们收到了所有这些播放器的支持请求。来自 Mux 的 @luwes 完成了获得新版本的工作，同时使 Media Chrome 媒体元素与 React Player 一起使用成为可能，并巩固了一些开发工作。我们仍然是一个很小的球员团队，所以这很重要。

目前还没有立即弃用 React Player 的计划，我认为它在生态系统中占有特殊的地位，但与 video.js v10 会有重叠，如果您关心或感觉缺少某些特定功能，或者您认为我们做得不好，请在这里提出。

Vidstack 和 Plyr 的情况类似，Mux 首先赞助了这些项目。这就是我认识拉希姆和萨姆的方式，也是我们谈论球员未来共同愿景的方式。

OP and Mux co-founder here so have all the context on this. A lot has changed. Mux stepped in to help maintain React Player a few years ago. It wasn't getting frequent updates and Mux has a vested interest in the whole OSS player ecosystem (even if we didn't built it) because Mux Video (hosting) is player agnostic, and we get support requests for all of them. @luwes from Mux did the work to get to the new version, while making it possible to use Media Chrome media elements with React Player and consolidating some development efforts. We're still a tiny player team so that was important.

There are no immediate plans to deprecate React Player and I think it holds a special place in the ecosystem, but there will be overlap with video.js v10 and if there's specific features you care about or feel are missing, or if you think we're doing a bad job, please voice it here.

It was a similar story with Vidstack and Plyr, with Mux first sponsoring the projects. That's how I met Rahim and Sam, and how we got talking about a shared vision for the future of players.

在 HN 中查看
thedanbob 2026/03/25 06:55
很不错！我前段时间关闭了 video.js，因为它一直给我带来麻烦。期待尝试这个新版本。
Very nice! I switched off video.js some time ago because it kept giving me trouble. Looking forward to trying this new version.
在 HN 中查看
rahim_alwer 2026/03/25 08:00
谢谢你！我是 Video.js 团队的成员，我们希望您试用该库并分享您的反馈。我们特别渴望听到过去使用或尝试过 v8 的开发人员的来信。

我们正在对库采取一种新方法，其中包含许多新概念，因此您的反馈将在测试期间为我们提供大量帮助，因为我们可以找出哪些效果很好，哪些效果不佳。

Thank you! I’m on the Video.js team, and we’d love for you to try the library out and share your feedback. We’re especially eager to hear from developers who used or tried v8 in the past.

We’re taking a new approach to the library with a lot of new concepts, so your feedback would help us a ton during Beta as we figure out what’s working well and what isn’t.

在 HN 中查看
esprehn 2026/03/25 09:55
这非常酷，但我很困惑为什么 React 播放器比 HTML 播放器小。那里的尺寸比较实际上是什么？
This is very cool, but I'm confused why the React player is smaller than the HTML player. What's actually in the size comparison there?
在 HN 中查看
rahim_alwer 2026/03/25 10:05
这主要是因为（1）React 运行时没有捆绑，所以从技术上来说它不是同类的，（2）Web 组件也包含 CSS，因为我们使用的是 Shadow DOM。

CSS 基本上只有几 kB，而用于管理 attr 到 prop 映射、简单生命周期、上下文等的薄“框架”层也只有几 kB。

It’s largely because (1) the React runtime is not bundled so it’s technically not apples to apples, (2) the Web Component includes CSS as well since we’re using Shadow DOM.

Basically few kB for CSS and few kB for a thin “framework” layer for managing attr to prop mapping, simple lifecycle, context, and so on.

在 HN 中查看
taosx 2026/03/25 09:43
有计划支持其他前端框架吗？如果我今天想在 svelte 之类的东西中使用它，我应该怎么做？
Are there any plans to support other frontend frameworks? If I wanted to use it today in something like svelte how should I go about it?
在 HN 中查看
rahim_alwer 2026/03/25 10:00
我们的设计目标是支持更多框架，特别是 Svelte 和 Vue，甚至包括 React Native！我们只是还不知道确切的时间，但我们在 v10 中的大部分方法是确保我们能够为每个前端框架提供最佳的体验。对我们来说重要的是，集成不像包装器，而是真正地道的。

与此同时，我们希望我们的自定义元素能够作为一个很好的权宜之计。包括 Svelte 在内的大多数框架都很好地支持它们，我们对 API 倾注了大量的热情，因此无论使用哪个框架，它们都感觉很好用。

如果您有兴趣深入了解，在架构上我们将采用与 TanStack 类似的方法，并从一开始就分离出共享核心，但还增加了分离 DOM 的步骤，以帮助有一天支持 RN。

We are designing with the goal of supporting more frameworks like Svelte and Vue specifically, even as far as React Native! We just don’t know when exactly yet but a large part of our approach in v10 is to make sure we can deliver the best possible experience to each frontend framework. It’s important for us that the integrations don’t feel like wrappers but truly idiomatic.

In the meantime, we’re hoping our custom elements will act as a good stopgap. Most frameworks including Svelte support them well, and we’re pouring love into the APIs so they feel good to use regardless of which framework.

If you’re interested in peeking under the hood, architecturally we’re taking a similar approach to TanStack and separating out a shared core from the beginning, but with one added step of splitting out the DOM as well to aid in supporting RN one day.

在 HN 中查看
nakodari 2026/03/25 06:23

Absolutely love what you and your friends have built. Great work! Will give it a spin.
在 HN 中查看
rahim_alwer 2026/03/25 08:01
我是 Video.js 团队的一员，只想对你们说声谢谢！意义重大，我们渴望听到您的尝试体验。如果有机会，请随时删除 GitHub 问题或讨论帖子 :)
I'm on the Video.js team, just wanted to say thank you! Means a lot and we'd be eager to hear your experience trying it out. Feel free to drop a GitHub issue or discussion post if you ever get a chance :)
在 HN 中查看
jen729w 2026/03/25 08:11
对我来说，在我们刚刚将大量视频部署到 Vimeo 后，这让我松了一口气。 下周 他们被收买了。

我是一个人操作的。每周提供数百个视频。我想要的只是掌控自己的命运。如果这个和 VPS 可以做到这一点，那就是 惊人的。谢谢你这样做。

From me, this is a massive relief after we just deployed a bunch of videos to Vimeo. The next week they were bought.

I'm a one-man operation. In the order of hundreds of videos served a week. All I want is control over my own destiny. If this and a VPS can do that, that'll be amazing. Thank you for doing this.

在 HN 中查看
KingMob 2026/03/25 11:09
如果您需要的 VPS 无法提供（例如真正的 CDN），您可以在 Swarmify.com 上查看我们。不过，这对于您的用例来说可能有点过分了。

当 videojs 10 正式发布时，我们将转向该版本。

If you need more than a VPS can provide (like a real CDN), you can check us out on Swarmify.com. It might be overkill for your use case, though.

We'll be moving to videojs 10 when it hits GA.

在 HN 中查看
grzes 2026/03/25 07:14
谁能推荐我一个好的、经过实战考验的“滑块”解决方案来播放视频以及显示单个图库中的图像？非常适合通过延迟加载处理巨大的画廊（数百个项目）

在 HN 中查看
Heff 2026/03/25 07:25
这不是今天的答案，但这是我很高兴在 video.js v10 的新预设概念中构建的东西，我们可以使用可组合架构构建超出标准播放器的特定“视频接口”。

https://videojs.org/docs/framework/react/concepts/presets

Not a today answer, but this is something I'm excited to build within the new Presets concept of video.js v10, where we can build specific "video interfaces" beyond a standard player using the composable architecture.

https://videojs.org/docs/framework/react/concepts/presets

efilife 2026/03/25 12:51
寻求主要 https://videojs.org/ 页面不适用于我的铬。

抛出未捕获（承诺中）类型错误：AbortSignal.any 不是函数 音量滑块数据attrs.BOpj3NK1.js

Seeking on the main https://videojs.org/ page doesn't work for me on chromium.

Throws Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: AbortSignal.any is not a function on volume-slider-data-attrs.BOpj3NK1.js

在 HN 中查看
rahim_alwer 2026/03/25 12:54
大家好，Video.js 团队的成员。您是在什么浏览器和版本上遇到此问题的？
Hey there, on the Video.js team. What browser and version did you run into this on?
在 HN 中查看
efilife 2026/03/25 13:04
114，具体来说，未通过谷歌搜索 Chromium。如果您需要的话，很乐意分享更多信息
114, Ungoogled Chromium to be specific. Happy to share more info if you need it

rahim_alwer 2026/03/25 13:44
我已为您订好了票 [1]，明天我会调查一下。谢谢你！

[1]： https://github.com/videojs/v10/issues/1120

I have that ticketed up for you [1], and I'll look into it tomorrow. Thank you!

在 HN 中查看
EGreg 2026/03/25 09:21
严肃的问题。目前我们的框架中有这个工具，我们用它来播放来自 youtube、vimeo 和许多其他网站的视频：

https://github.com/Qbix/Platform/blob/main/platform/plugins/...

我们目前已经使用 video.js，并且我们的框架已经在各处使用，所以我们将是你们的完美用例。

我们将如何使用 video.js 10 来代替，用途是什么？我们想加载一个小型视频播放器来播放视频，但是哪些呢？只有 mp4 文件，还是我们可以通过 HTTP 以某种方式流式传输块，而无需在 2026 年设置像 Wowsa 或 Red5 这样可笑的流媒体服务器？

Serious question. We currently have this tool in our framework, that we use to play videos from youtube, vimeo, and a whole lot of other sites:

https://github.com/Qbix/Platform/blob/main/platform/plugins/...

We currently already use video.js, and our framework us used all over the place, so we’d be the perfect use case for you guys.

How would we use video.js 10 instead, and for what? We would like to load a small video player, for videos, but which ones? Only mp4 files or can we somehow stream chunks via HTTP without setting up ridiculous streaming servers like Wowsa or Red5 in 2026?

在 HN 中查看
Heff 2026/03/25 11:42
那太棒了！看起来您与以前版本的 Video.js 进行了相当广泛的集成，因此迁移需要一些工作，但我认为当您有时间时这是值得的。也就是说，对于 Beta，它可以与浏览器支持的格式和 HLS 配合使用，并在我们迁移 Media Chrome 生态系统中的内容时支持 Youtube 和 Vimeo 等服务[1]。因此，如果这就是您所需要的，请屏住呼吸几个星期。

您今天支持什么需要 Wowza 或 Red5？简而言之，Video.js 只是前端，因此它对实时流媒体的服务器端没有太大帮助。我当然很乐意推荐使这部分变得更容易的服务。

[1] https://github.com/muxinc/media-elements

That's great! It looks like you have a pretty extensive integration with the prior version of Video.js, so migrating will take some work, but I think worth it when you can make the time. That said, for Beta it works with browser-supported formats and HLS, with support for services like Youtube and Vimeo close behind as we migrate what we haver in the Media Chrome ecosystem[1]. So if that's what you need maybe hold your breath for a few weeks.

What are you supporting today that requires Wowza or Red5? The short answer is Video.js is only the front-end so it won't help the server side of live streaming much. I'm of course happy to recommend services that make that part easier though.

[1] https://github.com/muxinc/media-elements

在 HN 中查看
EGreg 2026/03/25 12:38
感谢您的反馈。是的，我绝对明白 Video.js 只是前端。我想要 避免 使用 Wowza / Red5，只想提供视频文件块，本质上是缓冲它们并将它们粘贴到“流的末尾”，在 video.js 火车行驶在这些轨道上之前铺设轨道。

所以我只是想知道我们是否可以通过这种方式进行流式传输，并且 video.js 可以在我们获取前面的块时“正常工作”来播放视频（没有流式传输服务器的“缓冲”，只是基本的 HTTP 范围请求或类似）。

Thank you for your feedback. Yep I definitely understand that Video.js is just the front end. I want to avoid using Wowza / Red5 and just want to serve chunks of video files, essentially, buffering them and pasting them to the "end of the stream" laying down tracks ahead of the video.js train riding over those tracks.

So I'm just wondering whether we can do streaming that way, and video.js can "just work" to play the video as we fetch chunks ahead of it ("buffering" without streaming servers, just basic HTTP range requests or similar).

在 HN 中查看
colonCapitalDee 2026/03/25 13:06
您应该查看 HLS 和 DASH。如果您已经熟悉它们并且因为它们不满足您的要求而没有使用它们，那么对于愚蠢的推荐表示歉意。如果没有，这可以解决您的问题。
You should check out HLS and DASH. If you're already familiar and you're not using them because they don't meet your requirements, then apologies for the foolish recommendation. If not, this could solve your problem.
